title: Rebecca Returns to the Ring
description: Pages 16–19 focus on rebecca returns to the ring, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as rebecca's bond with the one-legged toy soldier is revealed through her memories of Scarlet, while the Colosseum pulls her back into the fight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: live in a house together, soldier- San.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I will teach you how to fight!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Nah, that's alright. I've got you, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And what if something should happen to me!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Mother always said it's wrong to hurt others...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: So I will teach you how to avoid being hurt, yourself!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You were always by my side.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Time and time again you pro- tested me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: She seemed so nice! You've gotta be kidding!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: It's our coldose- um's most beautiful young glad- later!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: the fighter who heats up the ring to the boiling point!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Today's the day you'll drop dead!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: You member of that rotten family!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: One piece,will take a break next week!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Eh!? Why does everyone hate her so much!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: But Rebecca's grandfather is the much-hated former King of this land!!

summary: Rebecca Returns to the Ring focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as rebecca's bond with the one-legged toy soldier is revealed through her memories of Scarlet, while the Colosseum pulls her back into the fight.
